ques: Obtain the LA Clippers' current season record on ESPN, including wins, losses, and division standing.

ques: Find out who the leading rusher is in the current NFL season using statistics available on ESPN. Note their total rushing yards and the team they play for.

ques: Research the French Open winners (singles) from the last year's tournament as listed on ESPN, indicating the male and female champions.

ques: Check ESPN for the score of the most recent Los Angeles Dodgers game and provide the winning pitcher's name.

ques: Identify three guesthouses in Madrid that allow pets and offer free WiFi for a weekend stay from NEXTMONTH 10 to NEXTMONTH 12, 2025.

Step 2: Locate the location filter above the schedule, which may be defaulted to a city like 'Los Angeles, CA', and click on it.
Step 3: From the location options, change the city to 'Chicago, IL' to filter the event list.
Step 4: Observe that the updated page shows a message indicating 'There are no events scheduled in this area.'
Step 5: To confirm this, navigate back to the homepage search bar, type 'Shane Gillis Chicago', and click the 'Search' button.
Step 6: Review the search results, which will again show no events, confirming that tickets for Shane Gillis in Chicago are not available through this website.

ques: Using the Yahoo Sports search function, find the top-ranked fantasy football player on both the Yahoo Sports and ESPN rankings pages to determine if they are the same player.
checklist:
Step 0: Starting from the Yahoo Sports homepage, click into the central search bar at the top of the page.
Step 1: Type 'Fantasy Football player rankings' into the search bar.
Step 2: Press the Enter key or click the search icon to submit your query.
Step 3: On the search results page, locate and click on the result link that directs to the official Yahoo Sports fantasy football rankings.
Step 4: On the Yahoo rankings page, observe and remember the name of the player listed at the #1 rank.
Step 5: Navigate back to the previous search results page using your browser's back functionality.
Step 6: From the same search results, locate and click on the result link for player rankings from 'www.espn.com', as mentioned in the original guidebook's alternative options.
Step 7: On the ESPN rankings page, observe the name of the player listed at the #1 rank.
Step 8: Compare the player you found on Yahoo with the player you found on ESPN to determine if they are the same person, completing the task.

ques: Search for hourly parking in Miami for today, for a specific time range from morning to evening.
checklist:
Step 0: On the homepage, ensure the 'Hourly/Daily' button is selected, which is the default search mode.
Step 1: In the 'Where are you going?' text field, type 'Miami, FL'.
Step 2: Click the dropdown field labeled 'When do you need to park?' to open the date and time selection interface.
Step 3: In the time selection menu that appears, click on the start time, which defaults to '6:00 AM'.
Step 4: From the list of times, select '8:00 AM' as the new entry time.
Step 5: Click on the end time, which defaults to '9:00 AM'.
Step 6: From the list of times, select '5:00 PM' as the new exit time.
Step 7: Click the 'Find Parking Spots' button to initiate the search for available hourly spots.

ques: Find a specific best-selling graphic t-shirt in the kids' section, select a size, and add it to the wishlist.
checklist:
Step 0: From the main navigation bar at the top of the page, click on the 'KIDS' tab to go to the kids' products section.
Step 1: A promotional pop-up may appear. Click the 'DECLINE OFFER' link at the bottom of the pop-up to close it.
Step 2: In the sub-navigation menu for the KIDS category, locate and click on the 'UT: Graphic Tees' link.
Step 3: On the Graphic Tees page, scroll down to find and click on the 'Minecraft UT Graphic T-Shirt'.
Step 4: On the product detail page, select the 'BLACK' color option.
Step 5: Under the 'SIZE' options, click on the button for size '5-6Y(120)'.
Step 6: Click the heart icon to add the selected item to your wishlist.

ques: Using the Yahoo Sports search function, navigate to Pro-Football-Reference.com to find the NFL player who had the most passing yards during the 2015 playoffs.
checklist:
Step 0: On the Yahoo Sports homepage, locate the search bar at the top and type 'NFL playoff passing stats'.
Step 1: Click the purple 'Search' button to the right of the search bar to see the results.
Step 2: On the search results page, click the link from 'www.pro-football-reference.com' related to NFL Playoff Passing Leaders.
Step 3: On the Pro-Football-Reference page, locate the section titled 'See leaders through past seasons'.
Step 4: Click the first dropdown menu, which defaults to a stat like 'Passing Touchdowns', and select 'Passing Yards'.
Step 5: Click the second dropdown menu, which defaults to 'Single Season', and select 'Playoffs'.
Step 6: Click the third dropdown menu showing the year and select '2015' from the list.
Step 7: Click the green 'Go!' button located below the year selection to apply the filters.
Step 8: View the updated table to identify the player ranked first for the 2015 playoff passing yards.

ques: Find and view the detailed team statistics for the Los Angeles Lakers basketball team.
checklist:
Step 0: In the main navigation bar near the top of the page, click on the 'NBA' link.
Step 1: In the search bar at the top of the page, type 'Los Angeles Lakers'.
Step 2: Click the purple search icon to the right of the search bar.
Step 3: From the dropdown menu that appears, click on the 'Los Angeles Lakers' link listed under the 'TEAMS' section.
Step 4: On the team's main page, close the 'Install your team's feed' pop-up if it appears.
Step 5: In the navigation menu below the team's name, click on the 'Stats' tab.
Step 6: Locate the 'TEAM STATS' section on the page to view the team's performance metrics.

ques: Find and view details for the closest available parking spot for an evening event at the American Airlines Center.
checklist:
Step 0: In the 'Search for parking' text box, type 'American Airlines Center' to begin your search.
Step 1: When the 'Select Reservation Date and Time' window appears, click on the 'Start Time' field, which defaults to '12:00 PM'.
Step 2: From the time selection dropdown, choose '6:00 PM'.
Step 3: Click on the 'End Time' field.
Step 4: From the time selection dropdown, choose '11:00 PM'.
Step 5: Click the 'Confirm' button to see parking options for the specified time.
Step 6: On the results page, click the 'Sort by Featured' dropdown menu.
Step 7: Select 'Distance' from the dropdown options to reorder the list by proximity.
Step 8: Click the 'View Details' button on the first result, which is now the closest parking spot.

ques: Plan a future, accessible-only trip from the Museum of Science to Fenway Park, ensuring an arrival by a specific time.
checklist:
Step 0: Click on the 'Trip Planner' tab, located in the main navigation bar, to open the trip planning tool.
Step 1: In the 'From' text field, type 'Museum of Science' to set your starting point, and select the correct option from the dropdown list.
Step 2: In the 'To' text field, type 'Fenway Park' to set your destination, and select the correct option from the dropdown list.
Step 3: Click the 'Arrive by' button to switch from planning a trip 'Now' to planning based on a specific arrival time.
Step 4: In the time selection interface that appears, set the desired arrival time to 7:00 PM.
Step 5: Click the checkbox next to 'Prefer accessible routes' to filter the results for accessibility.
Step 6: Review the generated trip suggestions to find the best route that meets the arrival time and accessibility requirements.

ques: Find the complete list of player transactions for the Boston Celtics during the current NBA season.
checklist:
Step 0: In the search bar at the top of the page, type "Boston Celtics transactions".
Step 1: Click the purple search button to its right to initiate the search.
Step 2: On the search results page, locate the link from espn.com titled "Boston Celtics Transactions - ESPN".
Step 3: Click on the "Boston Celtics Transactions - ESPN" link to navigate to the team's page on ESPN.
Step 4: On the ESPN page, locate the navigation menu below the team name, which includes options like 'Home', 'Stats', 'Schedule', etc.
Step 5: Click on the 'Transactions' tab in the navigation menu to view the team's transaction history.
Step 6: Scroll down to view the detailed list of player movements, including trades, signings, and waivers for the season.

ques: How to find and select tickets for a specific Blink-182 concert.
checklist:
Step 0: In the search bar labeled 'Search for artists, teams or venues...', type 'Blink-182' to begin your search.
Step 1: The search may show various results. To specify your interest, click the 'CONCERTS' button in the main orange navigation menu.
Step 2: On the Concerts page, find the list of music genres below the search bar and click on a relevant category like 'Rock' or 'Alternative'.
Step 3: On the genre page, locate the 'POPULAR EVENTS' or a similar list on the left-hand side and click on the 'Blink-182' link.
Step 4: You will now see a schedule of upcoming Blink-182 concerts. Scroll down to browse the available dates and venues.
Step 5: Find a concert on a date and at a venue that you are interested in, and click the blue 'TICKETS' button to the right of that listing.

ques: Starting from the Yahoo Sports homepage, find the spread for the upcoming game between the Houston Rockets and Oklahoma City Thunder.
checklist:
Step 0: On the Yahoo Sports homepage, locate the search bar at the top of the page and type 'NBA odds'.
Step 1: Click the purple search button to the right of the search bar.
Step 2: On the search results page, scroll down past the game schedules and find the 'Searches related to NBA odds' section.
Step 3: Click on the link 'nba odds to win championship'.
Step 4: From the updated search results, locate and click on the ESPN link titled 'NBA Futures - 2025-26 NBA Finals Champion Odds - ESPN'.
Step 5: On the ESPN page, scroll down past the 'NBA Championship Winner' table to the 'NBA Odds' section.
Step 6: Locate the game listing for the 'Houston Rockets' and 'Oklahoma City Thunder'.
Step 7: Find the 'Spread' column for this game to identify the betting spread.

ques: Find and view the latest NFL news headlines using the top navigation bar on Yahoo Sports.
checklist:
Step 0: If you are first directed to a Yahoo login page, use your browser's 'Back' button to return to the sports homepage.
Step 1: On the Yahoo Sports homepage, locate the main navigation bar below the search bar.
Step 2: Click on the 'NFL' link in the navigation bar to go to the NFL section.
Step 3: On the NFL page, scroll down past the scores to the 'Top News' section.
Step 4: Locate an article of interest, for example, one about the Dallas Cowboys.
Step 5: Click on the headline of the article to read the full story.
Step 6: After reading the article, scroll to the bottom of the page to see the comments section.

ques: Find all available monthly parking spots near your current location that offer covered parking.
checklist:
Step 0: On the homepage, select the "Monthly" tab to search for long-term parking options.
Step 1: Click the "Find Parking Near Me" button to use your current location for the search.
Step 2: On the results page, locate and click the "Filters" button to open the search refinement options.
Step 3: In the filters menu that appears, scroll to the "Amenities" section.
Step 4: Click the checkbox next to the "Covered" amenity to select it.
Step 5: Click the button to apply the filter and view the updated results, which now only show covered parking spots.

ques: Find the highest-rated TV shows currently available to stream on Rotten Tomatoes, sorted by critic scores.
checklist:
Step 0: From the main navigation bar at the top of the page, click on the "TV SHOWS" link to go to the TV show browsing page.
Step 1: Below the page title, click the filter button that shows the current viewing option (e.g., "STREAMING") to open a dropdown menu.
Step 2: From the dropdown menu that appears, select the "STREAMING" option to view TV shows available on streaming platforms.
Step 3: Click the "SORT" button to open a menu with different sorting options.
Step 4: In the sort menu, select the "TOMATOMETER® (HIGHEST)" option to arrange the TV shows by the highest critic rating.
Step 5: The page will now display a list of TV shows available to stream, sorted from the highest Tomatometer score to the lowest.

ques: After unsuccessfully searching for a specific sports team, subscribe to the website's newsletter.
checklist:
Step 0: Locate the search bar labeled 'Search for artists, teams or venues...' on the homepage.
Step 1: In the search bar, type 'Lubbock Matadors'.
Step 2: Click the blue 'Search' button located to the right of the search bar.
Step 3: On the search results page, confirm that there are 'no events found'.
Step 4: Scroll down to the footer section at the bottom of the page.
Step 5: Find the 'Subscribe to our newsletter' section and click into the 'Email Address' field.
Step 6: Type 'newfan@email.com' into the email address field.
Step 7: Click the orange 'Join' button to complete the subscription.
